name: Project ARVT-88 Ultimate Hardware Bill of Materials

structural_fasteners_and_chassis.specification: Stainless Steel (Grade 316 Marine), Length: 1000mm, Thread Pitch: 1.0mm
structural_fasteners_and_chassis.purpose: Clamps the stacked 3D-printed tower modules together under high continuous tension

structural_fasteners_and_chassis.specification: Stainless Steel (Grade 316), Length: 30mm, Internal Thread: M6x1.0
structural_fasteners_and_chassis.purpose: Joins the 1000mm tie-rods together vertically to span the full 3-meter tower height

structural_fasteners_and_chassis.specification: Stainless Steel hex locking nuts with high-vibration nylon collar inserts
structural_fasteners_and_chassis.purpose: Secures tie-rod ends against high-frequency cavitation micro-vibrations

structural_fasteners_and_chassis.specification: Stainless Steel, Oversized Mudguard/Fender Style Outer Diameter
structural_fasteners_and_chassis.purpose: Distributes heavy clamping torque evenly across printed plastic mounting ears

electrodynamic_and_advanced_harvesting.specification: Grade N52 Rare-Earth, OD: 76.2mm, ID: 51.5mm, Thickness: 25.4mm, Axial Magnetization
electrodynamic_and_advanced_harvesting.purpose: Generates the continuous dense magnetic flux crossing the fluid track inside ARVT-03
Machined down to act as flush-mount, corrosion-resistant pickup electrodes

electrodynamic_and_advanced_harvesting.specification: Waterproof ETFE Coating, Dimensions: 1050mm x 140mm, Nominal Output: 50W each (Total 150W)
electrodynamic_and_advanced_harvesting.purpose: Populates the ARVT-07 exoskeleton framework to harvest ambient environmental light waves

electrodynamic_and_advanced_harvesting.item: PZT-5H Lead Zirconate Titanate Ceramic Rings
electrodynamic_and_advanced_harvesting.specification: Piezoelectric Element, OD: 65.0mm, ID: 51.5mm, Thickness: 5.0mm, Silver Electroded Faces
electrodynamic_and_advanced_harvesting.purpose: Intercepts and converts raw water hammer kinetic stress pulses inside ARVT-08 into AC energy

electrodynamic_and_advanced_harvesting.specification: Gauge: 24 AWG, Polyurethane-Polyamide Insulation Layer (Heavy Build, 155°C Thermal Rating)
electrodynamic_and_advanced_harvesting.purpose: Wound onto ARVT-09 spools to form the secondary 500-turn Faraday induction coils

electrodynamic_and_advanced_harvesting.specification: Grade 316 Woven Wire Mesh, Wire Diameter: 0.8mm, Mesh Aperture Size: 2.0mm
electrodynamic_and_advanced_harvesting.purpose: Sits inside ARVT-10 over the intake funnel to collect atmospheric air-vortex static potentials

electrodynamic_and_advanced_harvesting.specification: Solid Grade 316 Stainless Steel, Length: 35mm, Needle Sharpness Radius: <0.05mm
electrodynamic_and_advanced_harvesting.purpose: Bleeds electrostatic potential fields safely out of the hollow low-pressure air core

mesh_telemetry_and_communications.specification: Dual-Core 32-bit Xtensa LX7, Integrated Wi-Fi/BLE, 8MB Flash, Extended Temp Profile
mesh_telemetry_and_communications.purpose: Acts as the central edge-computing intelligence node inside the ARVT-06 tracking case

mesh_telemetry_and_communications.specification: Operating Frequency: 915MHz, Sub-GHz SPI Interface, High Sensitivity down to -148dBm
mesh_telemetry_and_communications.purpose: Drives long-range ad-hoc peer-to-peer data broadcasts across neighboring towers

mesh_telemetry_and_communications.specification: Frequency: 915MHz omnidirectional, Gain: 5dBi, Connector Type: SMA-Male, Weatherproof Glassfiber
mesh_telemetry_and_communications.purpose: Broadcasts data frames up to a 5-mile local radius completely off-the-grid

mesh_telemetry_and_communications.specification: RG178 Coaxial, Impedance: 50-Ohm, Length: 150mm, IPEX/u.FL to SMA-Female Bulkhead
mesh_telemetry_and_communications.purpose: Routes the RF signal cleanly through the non-conductive enclosure box wall with zero signal bleed

mesh_telemetry_and_communications.specification: Thickness: 0.05mm, Conductive Acrylic Adhesive Backing, Width: 50mm
mesh_telemetry_and_communications.purpose: Forms the Faraday isolation cage frame surrounding the microcontroller to suppress magnetic noise

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Forward Current: 3A, Repetitive Reverse Voltage: 40V, Low Forward Voltage Drop (<0.5V)
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Prevents reverse current from bleeding back into the graphite electrodes when flow drifts

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Forward Current: 1A, Peak Reverse Voltage: 1000V
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Prevents the battery bank from discharging backward through the solar panels at night

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Glass Passivated, Forward Current: 1A, Maximum Reverse Voltage: 1000V, DIP-4 Package
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Flushes high-voltage alternating current piezoelectric vibration pulses into raw DC

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.item: LM2596 Step-Down Buck DC-DC Regulator Modules
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Input Range: 4V-40V, Output Adjustable Range: 1.23V-37V, Continuous Current: 2A
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Calibrates variable high-voltage inputs down to a stable 18.5V DC charging threshold

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Transient Voltage Suppression, Breakdown Voltage: 30V, Peak Pulse Power: 1500W
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Passively clamps explosive environmental voltage surges if atmospheric static strikes the tower

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Metal Glaze Film, Power Rating: 2W, Maximum Operating Voltage: 3500V, Resistance: 10MΩ
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Safely slows down and dampens the atmospheric electrostatic grid discharge rate

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Polypropylene Film Dielectric, Capacitance: 0.1uF, Rated Voltage: 1000V DC
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Acts as an electrostatic energy sponge, catching raw grid charges before regulation

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Capacitance: 2200uF, Rated Voltage: 63V, Low-ESR, Radial Leads, 105°C Endurance Rating
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Filters high-frequency voltage ripples caused by hydraulic turbulence crossing the magnet rings

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Material: FR-4 Flame Retardant, Dimensions: 100mm x 150mm, Pre-Drilled Tinned Holes
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Provides the structural base for hand-soldering the combiner circuit tracks

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Forward Current: 3A, Peak Reverse Voltage: 1000V, 4-Pin SIP Package
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Converts the three-phase AC power output from the top-mounted air turbine generator into clean DC before routing it to the combiner bus

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Outer Diameter (OD): 60mm, Inner Diameter (ID): 50.8mm, Wall Thickness: 4.6mm, Length: 250mm
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Serves as the high-strength visual window for the ARVT-04 Figure-8 Collision Chamber

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Type K (Thick Wall Structural Plumbing), Outer Diameter (OD): 12.7mm (1/2")
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Forms the solar-absorbent vertical return conduit for the upward thermosyphon lift

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Inner Diameter (ID): 25.4mm (1"), Wall Thickness: 2.0mm, Length: 1000mm sections
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Encases copper return pipe to create an insulation greenhouse vacuum envelope for solar lift

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.item: Weighted Brass Hydraulic Ram Waste Valve
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Size: 1" NPT Thread Female, Swing-check mechanism with a calibrated 350g counterweight
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Snaps shut violently when flow velocity peaks to trigger the water hammer return spike

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Inside Diameter (ID): 25mm, Cross-Section Thickness: 3.5mm, Hardness Durometer: 70A
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Creates a pressurized, fluid-tight compression seal at all inter-module grid junctions

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Premium Industrial Density, Width: 1/2", Thickness: 0.1mm
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Seals NPT threaded metal connections between the ram valves and printed plenum blocks

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Pure Polydimethylsiloxane Compound, Waterproof, NSF-61 Drinking Water Certified
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Lubricates EPDM O-rings to prevent pinching or friction tearing during final column assembly

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Gauge: 14 AWG, Flexible, High-Temperature/High-Dielectric Silicone Insulation Layer
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Routes consolidated current paths from the electrodes and solar frames to the board

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Two-part high-conductivity structural adhesive, Electrical Resistivity: <0.001 ohm-cm
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Bonds insulated copper hookup leads securely to the raw graphite electrode rods

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Composition: 99.3% Tin / 0.7% Copper, Diameter: 0.8mm, integrated flux core
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Secures electrical connections on the FR-4 combiner board under high-vibration boundaries

solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.specification: Thread Size: M3, Assorted Lengths (6mm, 10mm, 15mm), Non-Conductive Nylon-66
solid_state_combiner_circuit_and_seals.purpose: Mounts the circuit board securely inside the non-conductive box, preventing short tracks
